source_sections.label: Official Updates
source_sections.description: Product, research, and platform updates from official vendor or lab channels.

items.title: "Hai Na Bai Chuan" program offers free Baichuan-M3-Plus API for healthcare service providers
items.summary_short: Baichuan AI launched the "Hai Na Bai Chuan" initiative to provide free access to the Baichuan-M3-Plus API for institutions serving medical professionals. The program is positioned to help partners deploy safer, evidence-grounded medical AI in clinical decision support and medical education scenarios

topic_refs.headline: "Hai Na Bai Chuan" program offers free Baichuan-M3-Plus API for healthcare service providers

items.title_zh: “海纳百川”计划为医疗服务提供方提供免费的 Baichuan-M3-Plus API
items.summary_short_zh: Baichuan AI 推出了“海纳百川”计划，为服务医疗专业人士的机构提供免费的 Baichuan-M3-Plus API 访问。该计划旨在帮助合作伙伴在临床决策支持和医学教育场景中部署更安全、基于证据的医疗 AI

items.title: ByteDance Seed 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment Opens
items.summary_short: ByteDance Seed announced that its 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment program is now open, including internship opportunities. This is a company recruitment announcement for students interested in joining the foundation model team

topic_refs.headline: ByteDance Seed 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment Opens

items.title_zh: ByteDance Seed 2027 基础模型校园招聘启动
items.summary_short_zh: ByteDance Seed 宣布其 2027 基础模型校园招聘项目现已开放，包括实习机会。这是一则面向有意加入基础模型团队学生的公司招聘公告

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.4 mini and nano
items.summary_short: GPT-5.4 mini and nano are smaller, faster versions of GPT-5.4 optimized for coding, tool use, multimodal reasoning, and high-volume API and sub-agent workloads

topic_refs.headline: Introducing GPT-5.4 mini and nano

items.title_zh: 推出 GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano
items.summary_short_zh: GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 是 GPT-5.4 更小、更快的版本，针对编程、工具使用、多模态推理以及高吞吐 API 和子代理工作负载进行了优化

items.title: OpenAI Japan announces Japan Teen Safety Blueprint to put teen safety first
items.summary_short: OpenAI Japan announces the Japan Teen Safety Blueprint, introducing stronger age protections, parental controls, and well-being safeguards for teens using generative AI

topic_refs.headline: OpenAI Japan announces Japan Teen Safety Blueprint to put teen safety first

items.title_zh: OpenAI Japan 宣布 Japan Teen Safety Blueprint，将青少年安全置于首位

items.title: Equipping workers with insights about compensation
items.summary_short: New research shows Americans send nearly 3 million daily messages to ChatGPT asking about compensation and earnings, helping close the wage information gap

items.title_zh: 为劳动者提供有关薪酬的洞察

source_sections.label: Research Papers
source_sections.description: Research papers and paper-trending signals tied to the current day.

items.title: Demystifing Video Reasoning
items.summary_short: Recent advances in video generation have revealed an unexpected phenomenon: diffusion-based video models exhibit non-trivial reasoning capabilities. Prior work attributes this to a Chain-of-Frames (CoF) mechanism, where reasoning is assumed to unfold sequentially across video frames.

topic_refs.headline: Demystifing Video Reasoning

items.title_zh: 揭开视频推理的神秘面纱
items.summary_short_zh: 视频生成的最新进展揭示了一个意想不到的现象：基于扩散的视频模型展现出非平凡的推理能力。先前工作将其归因于一种逐帧链（Chain-of-Frames，CoF）机制，即假设推理会在视频帧之间按顺序展开。

items.title: Capability-Guided Compression: Toward Interpretability-Aware Budget Allocation for Large Language Models
items.summary_short: Large language model compression has made substantial progress through pruning, quantization, and low-rank decomposition, yet a fundamental limitation persists across all existing methods: compression budgets are allocated without any representation of what individual model components functionally

topic_refs.headline: Capability-Guided Compression: Toward Interpretability-Aware Budget Allocation for Large Language Models

items.title_zh: 能力引导压缩：迈向面向可解释性的 大语言模型预算分配
items.summary_short_zh: 通过剪枝、量化和低秩分解，大语言模型压缩已取得显著进展，但所有现有方法都存在一个根本限制：压缩预算的分配没有体现各个模型组件在功能上的作用

items.title: BATQuant: Outlier-resilient MXFP4 Quantization via Learnable Block-wise Optimization
items.summary_short: Microscaling floating-point (MXFP) formats have emerged as a promising standard for deploying Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) and Large Language Models (LLMs) on modern accelerator architectures.

topic_refs.headline: BATQuant: Outlier-resilient MXFP4 Quantization via Learnable Block-wise Optimization

items.title_zh: BATQuant：通过可学习的分块优化实现抗异常值的 MXFP4 量化
items.summary_short_zh: 微缩浮点（MXFP）格式已成为在现代加速器架构上部署多模态大语言模型（MLLM）和大语言模型（LLM）的有前景标准。

items.title: An Efficient Heterogeneous Co-Design for Fine-Tuning on a Single GPU
items.summary_short: Fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs) has become essential for domain adaptation, but its memory-intensive property exceeds the capabilities of most GPUs. To address this challenge and democratize LLM fine-tuning, we present SlideFormer, a novel system designed for single-GPU environments.

topic_refs.headline: An Efficient Heterogeneous Co-Design for Fine-Tuning on a Single GPU

items.title_zh: 面向单 GPU 微调的高效异构协同设计
items.summary_short_zh: 微调大语言模型（LLM）已成为领域适配的关键，但其高内存消耗特性超出了大多数 GPU 的能力。为应对这一挑战并推动 LLM 微调普及，我们提出了 SlideFormer，这是一种专为单 GPU 环境设计的新系统。

items.title: Behavioral Steering in a 35B MoE Language Model via SAE-Decoded Probe Vectors: One Agency Axis, Not Five Traits
items.summary_short: We train nine sparse autoencoders (SAEs) on the residual stream of Qwen 3.5-35B-A3B, a 35-billion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model with a hybrid GatedDeltaNet/attention architecture, and use them to identify and steer five agentic behavioral traits.

topic_refs.headline: Behavioral Steering in a 35B MoE Language Model via SAE-Decoded Probe Vectors: One Agency Axis, Not Five Traits

items.title_zh: 通过 SAE 解码探针向量在 35B MoE 语言模型中进行行为引导：一个能动性轴，而非五种特质
items.summary_short_zh: 我们在 Qwen 3.5-35B-A3B 的残差流上训练了九个稀疏自编码器（SAE）。该模型是一个拥有 350 亿参数、采用混合 GatedDeltaNet/attention 架构的专家混合模型，并利用这些 SAE 来识别和引导五种代理行为特质。

items.title: SocialOmni: Benchmarking Audio-Visual Social Interactivity in Omni Models
items.summary_short: Omni-modal large language models (OLMs) redefine human-machine interaction by natively integrating audio, vision, and text.
items.spotlight_comment: Omni-modal large language models (OLMs) redefine human-machine interaction by natively integrating audio, vision, and text.
items.title_zh: SocialOmni：对 Omni 模型中的音视频社交交互性进行基准测试
items.summary_short_zh: 全模态大语言模型（OLM）通过原生整合音频、视觉和文本，重新定义了人机交互。
items.spotlight_comment_zh: 全模态大语言模型（OLMs）通过原生整合音频、视觉和文本，重新定义了人机交互。

items.title: InCoder-32B: Code Foundation Model for Industrial Scenarios
items.summary_short: Recent code large language models have achieved remarkable progress on general programming tasks. Nevertheless, their performance degrades significantly in industrial scenarios that require reasoning about hardware semantics, specialized language constructs, and strict resource constraints.
items.spotlight_comment: Recent code large language models have achieved remarkable progress on general programming tasks.
items.title_zh: InCoder-32B：面向工业场景的代码基础模型
items.summary_short_zh: 近年来，代码大语言模型在通用编程任务上取得了显著进展。然而，在需要理解硬件语义、专用语言结构以及严格资源约束的工业场景中，其性能会明显下降。
items.spotlight_comment_zh: 近年来，代码大语言模型在通用编程任务上取得了显著进展。

items.title: Kinema4D: Kinematic 4D World Modeling for Spatiotemporal Embodied Simulation
items.summary_short: Simulating robot-world interactions is a cornerstone of Embodied AI. Recently, a few works have shown promise in leveraging video generations to transcend the rigid visual/physical constraints of traditional simulators.
items.spotlight_comment: Simulating robot-world interactions is a cornerstone of Embodied AI. Recently, a few works have shown promise in leveraging video generations to transcend the rigid visual/physical constraints of traditional simulators.
items.title_zh: Kinema4D：用于时空具身仿真的运动学 4D 世界建模
items.summary_short_zh: 模拟机器人与世界的交互是具身 AI 的基石。近年来，一些工作展示了利用视频生成突破传统模拟器刚性视觉/物理约束的潜力。
items.spotlight_comment_zh: 模拟机器人与世界的交互是具身 AI 的基石。近年来，一些工作展示了利用视频生成突破传统模拟器刚性视觉/物理约束的潜力。

items.title: WorldCam: Interactive Autoregressive 3D Gaming Worlds with Camera Pose as a Unifying Geometric Representation
items.summary_short: Recent advances in video diffusion transformers have enabled interactive gaming world models that allow users to explore generated environments over extended horizons. However, existing approaches struggle with precise action control and long-horizon 3D consistency.
items.spotlight_comment: Recent advances in video diffusion transformers have enabled interactive gaming world models that allow users to explore generated environments over extended horizons.
items.title_zh: WorldCam：以相机位姿为统一几何表示的交互式自回归 3D 游戏世界
items.summary_short_zh: 视频扩散 Transformer 的最新进展催生了交互式游戏世界模型，使用户能够在更长时域内探索生成环境。然而，现有方法在精确动作控制和长时程 3D 一致性方面仍存在困难。
items.spotlight_comment_zh: 视频扩散 Transformer 的最新进展催生了交互式游戏世界模型，使用户能够在更长时域内探索生成环境。

items.title: TRUST-SQL: Tool-Integrated Multi-Turn Reinforcement Learning for Text-to-SQL over Unknown Schemas
items.summary_short: Text-to-SQL parsing has achieved remarkable progress under the Full Schema Assumption. However, this premise fails in real-world enterprise environments where databases contain hundreds of tables with massive noisy metadata.
items.spotlight_comment: Text-to-SQL parsing has achieved remarkable progress under the Full Schema Assumption. However, this premise fails in real-world enterprise environments where databases contain hundreds of tables with massive noisy metadata.
items.title_zh: TRUST-SQL：面向未知模式的工具集成多轮强化学习 Text-to-SQL
items.summary_short_zh: 在完整模式假设下，Text-to-SQL 解析已取得显著进展。然而，这一前提在真实企业环境中并不成立，因为数据库往往包含数百张表和大量带噪元数据。
items.spotlight_comment_zh: 在完整模式假设下，Text-to-SQL 解析已取得显著进展。然而，这一前提在真实企业环境中并不成立，因为数据库往往包含数百张表和大量带噪元数据。

items.title: Online Experiential Learning for Language Models
items.summary_short: The prevailing paradigm for improving large language models relies on offline training with human annotations or simulated environments, leaving the rich experience accumulated during real-world deployment entirely unexploited.
items.spotlight_comment: The prevailing paradigm for improving large language models relies on offline training with human annotations or simulated environments, leaving the rich experience accumulated during real-world deployment entirely unexploited.
items.title_zh: 语言模型的在线经验学习
items.summary_short_zh: 当前提升大语言模型的主流范式依赖于带有人类标注或模拟环境的离线训练，完全没有利用其在真实部署过程中积累的丰富经验。
items.spotlight_comment_zh: 当前提升大语言模型的主流范式依赖于带有人类标注或模拟环境的离线训练，完全没有利用其在真实部署过程中积累的丰富经验。

items.title: Transformers are Bayesian Networks
items.summary_short: Transformers are the dominant architecture in AI, yet why they work remains poorly understood. This paper offers a precise answer: a transformer is a Bayesian network. We establish this in five ways.
items.title_zh: Transformer 是贝叶斯网络
items.summary_short_zh: Transformer 是 AI 中的主导架构，但其为何有效仍缺乏清晰理解。本文给出了一个精确答案：Transformer 是一种贝叶斯网络。我们从五个方面证明了这一点。

paper_spotlight.label: Daily Hot Papers
paper_spotlight.description: Papers that feel broadly important to the day and belong in the hotspot paper feed.

items.title: SocialOmni: Benchmarking Audio-Visual Social Interactivity in Omni Models
items.summary_short: Omni-modal large language models (OLMs) redefine human-machine interaction by natively integrating audio, vision, and text.
items.spotlight_comment: Omni-modal large language models (OLMs) redefine human-machine interaction by natively integrating audio, vision, and text.
items.title_zh: SocialOmni：全模态模型中音视频社交交互性的基准测试
items.summary_short_zh: 全模态大语言模型（OLMs）通过原生整合音频、视觉和文本，重新定义了人机交互。
items.spotlight_comment_zh: 全模态大语言模型（OLMs）通过原生整合音频、视觉和文本，重新定义了人机交互。

items.title: InCoder-32B: Code Foundation Model for Industrial Scenarios
items.summary_short: Recent code large language models have achieved remarkable progress on general programming tasks. Nevertheless, their performance degrades significantly in industrial scenarios that require reasoning about hardware semantics, specialized language constructs, and strict resource constraints.
items.spotlight_comment: Recent code large language models have achieved remarkable progress on general programming tasks.
items.title_zh: InCoder-32B：面向工业场景的代码基础模型
items.summary_short_zh: 近年来，代码大语言模型在通用编程任务上取得了显著进展。然而，在需要理解硬件语义、专用语言结构以及严格资源约束的工业场景中，其性能会明显下降。
items.spotlight_comment_zh: 近年来，代码大语言模型在通用编程任务上取得了显著进展。

items.title: Kinema4D: Kinematic 4D World Modeling for Spatiotemporal Embodied Simulation
items.summary_short: Simulating robot-world interactions is a cornerstone of Embodied AI. Recently, a few works have shown promise in leveraging video generations to transcend the rigid visual/physical constraints of traditional simulators.
items.spotlight_comment: Simulating robot-world interactions is a cornerstone of Embodied AI. Recently, a few works have shown promise in leveraging video generations to transcend the rigid visual/physical constraints of traditional simulators.
items.title_zh: Kinema4D：用于时空具身仿真的运动学4D世界建模
items.summary_short_zh: 模拟机器人与世界的交互是具身 AI 的基石。近年来，一些工作展示了利用视频生成突破传统模拟器在视觉和物理上的僵化约束的潜力。
items.spotlight_comment_zh: 模拟机器人与世界的交互是具身 AI 的基石。近年来，一些工作展示了利用视频生成突破传统模拟器在视觉和物理上的僵化约束的潜力。

items.title: WorldCam: Interactive Autoregressive 3D Gaming Worlds with Camera Pose as a Unifying Geometric Representation
items.summary_short: Recent advances in video diffusion transformers have enabled interactive gaming world models that allow users to explore generated environments over extended horizons. However, existing approaches struggle with precise action control and long-horizon 3D consistency.
items.spotlight_comment: Recent advances in video diffusion transformers have enabled interactive gaming world models that allow users to explore generated environments over extended horizons.
items.title_zh: WorldCam：以相机位姿为统一几何表示的交互式自回归3D游戏世界
items.summary_short_zh: 视频扩散 Transformer 的最新进展催生了交互式游戏世界模型，使用户能够在更长时域内探索生成环境。然而，现有方法在精确动作控制和长时程3D一致性方面仍存在困难。
items.spotlight_comment_zh: 视频扩散 Transformer 的最新进展催生了交互式游戏世界模型，使用户能够在更长时域内探索生成环境。

items.title: TRUST-SQL: Tool-Integrated Multi-Turn Reinforcement Learning for Text-to-SQL over Unknown Schemas
items.summary_short: Text-to-SQL parsing has achieved remarkable progress under the Full Schema Assumption. However, this premise fails in real-world enterprise environments where databases contain hundreds of tables with massive noisy metadata.
items.spotlight_comment: Text-to-SQL parsing has achieved remarkable progress under the Full Schema Assumption. However, this premise fails in real-world enterprise environments where databases contain hundreds of tables with massive noisy metadata.
items.title_zh: TRUST-SQL：面向未知模式的工具集成多轮强化学习 Text-to-SQL
items.summary_short_zh: 在完整模式假设下，Text-to-SQL 解析已取得显著进展。然而，这一前提在真实企业环境中并不成立，因为数据库往往包含数百张表和大量带噪声的元数据。
items.spotlight_comment_zh: 在完整模式假设下，Text-to-SQL 解析已取得显著进展。然而，这一前提在真实企业环境中并不成立，因为数据库往往包含数百张表和大量带噪声的元数据。

items.title: Online Experiential Learning for Language Models
items.summary_short: The prevailing paradigm for improving large language models relies on offline training with human annotations or simulated environments, leaving the rich experience accumulated during real-world deployment entirely unexploited.
items.spotlight_comment: The prevailing paradigm for improving large language models relies on offline training with human annotations or simulated environments, leaving the rich experience accumulated during real-world deployment entirely unexploited.
items.title_zh: 语言模型的在线经验学习
items.summary_short_zh: 当前改进大语言模型的主流范式依赖于结合人工标注或模拟环境的离线训练，导致其在真实世界部署过程中积累的丰富经验完全未被利用。
items.spotlight_comment_zh: 当前改进大语言模型的主流范式依赖于结合人工标注或模拟环境的离线训练，导致其在真实世界部署过程中积累的丰富经验完全未被利用。

topics.headline: Demystifing Video Reasoning
topics.summary_short: Recent advances in video generation have revealed an unexpected phenomenon: diffusion-based video models exhibit non-trivial reasoning capabilities. Prior work attributes this to a Chain-of-Frames (CoF) mechanism, where reasoning is assumed to unfold sequentially across video frames.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 2 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Demystifing Video Reasoning
evidence.title_zh: 揭开视频推理的神秘面纱

evidence.title: Demystifing Video Reasoning
evidence.title_zh: 揭开视频推理的神秘面纱

topics.headline_zh: 揭开视频推理的神秘面纱
topics.summary_short_zh: 视频生成的最新进展揭示了一个出人意料的现象：基于扩散的视频模型展现出非平凡的推理能力。先前工作将其归因于一种帧链（CoF）机制，即推理被认为会沿着视频帧顺序展开。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文在 2 个独立来源中出现。

topics.headline: An Efficient Heterogeneous Co-Design for Fine-Tuning on a Single GPU
topics.summary_short: Fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs) has become essential for domain adaptation, but its memory-intensive property exceeds the capabilities of most GPUs. To address this challenge and democratize LLM fine-tuning, we present SlideFormer, a novel system designed for single-GPU environments.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: An Efficient Heterogeneous Co-Design for Fine-Tuning on a Single GPU
evidence.title_zh: 单 GPU 微调的高效异构协同设计

topics.headline_zh: 单 GPU 微调的高效异构协同设计
topics.summary_short_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）的微调已成为领域适配的关键，但其高内存消耗特性超出了大多数 GPU 的能力。为应对这一挑战并推动 LLM 微调普及，我们提出了 SlideFormer，这是一种专为单 GPU 环境设计的新系统。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文在 1 个独立来源中出现。

topics.headline: BATQuant: Outlier-resilient MXFP4 Quantization via Learnable Block-wise Optimization
topics.summary_short: Microscaling floating-point (MXFP) formats have emerged as a promising standard for deploying Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) and Large Language Models (LLMs) on modern accelerator architectures.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: BATQuant: Outlier-resilient MXFP4 Quantization via Learnable Block-wise Optimization
evidence.title_zh: BATQuant：通过可学习分块优化实现抗异常值的 MXFP4 量化

topics.headline_zh: BATQuant：通过可学习分块优化实现抗异常值的 MXFP4 量化
topics.summary_short_zh: 微缩浮点（MXFP）格式已成为在现代加速器架构上部署多模态大语言模型（MLLM）和大语言模型（LLM）的有前景标准。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文在 1 个独立来源中出现。

topics.headline: Behavioral Steering in a 35B MoE Language Model via SAE-Decoded Probe Vectors: One Agency Axis, Not Five Traits
topics.summary_short: We train nine sparse autoencoders (SAEs) on the residual stream of Qwen 3.5-35B-A3B, a 35-billion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model with a hybrid GatedDeltaNet/attention architecture, and use them to identify and steer five agentic behavioral traits.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Behavioral Steering in a 35B MoE Language Model via SAE-Decoded Probe Vectors: One Agency Axis, Not Five Traits
evidence.title_zh: 通过 SAE 解码探针向量在 35B MoE 语言模型中进行行为引导：不是五种特质，而是一个能动性轴

topics.headline_zh: 通过 SAE 解码探针向量在 35B MoE 语言模型中进行行为引导：不是五种特质，而是一个能动性轴
topics.summary_short_zh: 我们在 Qwen 3.5-35B-A3B 的残差流上训练了九个稀疏自编码器（SAE）。Qwen 3.5-35B-A3B 是一个拥有 350 亿参数、采用混合 GatedDeltaNet/attention 架构的专家混合（MoE）模型。我们利用这些 SAE 来识别并引导五种 agentic 行为特质。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文在 1 个独立来源中出现。

topics.headline: Capability-Guided Compression: Toward Interpretability-Aware Budget Allocation for Large Language Models
topics.summary_short: Large language model compression has made substantial progress through pruning, quantization, and low-rank decomposition, yet a fundamental limitation persists across all existing methods: compression budgets are allocated without any representation of what individual model components functionally
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Capability-Guided Compression: Toward Interpretability-Aware Budget Allocation for Large Language Models
evidence.title_zh: 能力引导压缩：迈向面向可解释性的 大语言模型预算分配

topics.headline_zh: 能力引导压缩：迈向面向可解释性的 大语言模型预算分配
topics.summary_short_zh: 通过剪枝、量化和低秩分解，大语言模型压缩已取得显著进展，但所有现有方法都存在一个根本性局限：压缩预算的分配并未体现各个模型组件在功能上的作用
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文在 1 个独立来源中出现。

x_buzz.title: "Hai Na Bai Chuan" program offers free Baichuan-M3-Plus API for healthcare service providers
x_buzz.summary: Baichuan AI launched the "Hai Na Bai Chuan" initiative to provide free access to the Baichuan-M3-Plus API for institutions serving medical professionals. The program is positioned to help partners deploy safer, evidence-grounded medical AI in clinical decision support and medical education scenarios.
x_buzz.linked_topic: "Hai Na Bai Chuan" program offers free Baichuan-M3-Plus API for healthcare service providers

x_buzz.title: Baichuan-M1 released as the first medical-enhanced model
x_buzz.summary: Baichuan AI introduced Baichuan-M1 as its first medical-enhanced model and made it open-source for commercial use. The 14B-parameter model was trained with 20T of medical-enhanced corpus and supports 32K context.
x_buzz.linked_topic: "Hai Na Bai Chuan" program offers free Baichuan-M3-Plus API for healthcare service providers

x_buzz.title: Baichuan-M2 open-sourced as a deployable medical reasoning model
x_buzz.summary: Baichuan AI released Baichuan-M2 as an open-source, commercially usable medical reasoning model that can be deployed on a single RTX 4090 GPU. The 32B-parameter model supports 32K context and is presented as a top open model on HealthBench.
x_buzz.linked_topic: "Hai Na Bai Chuan" program offers free Baichuan-M3-Plus API for healthcare service providers
